chapter_title: Civil Liability of Persons Signing License Applications of Minors
text: For the purposes of this chapter, all persons under 18 years of age are minors.
markdown:
# Vehicle Code
## Division 9. CIVIL LIABILITY [17000 - 17714]
### Chapter 2. Civil Liability of Persons Signing License Applications of Minors [17700 - 17714]
##### § 17700

For the purposes of this chapter, all persons under 18 years of age are minors.

*(Amended by Stats. 1971, Ch. 1748.)*

subsections.text: For the purposes of this chapter, all persons under 18 years of age are minors.
